title: Legendary Enchants
description: Vanilla PvP, rebuilt from the ground up. Broken mechanics removed, skill-based enchants added. Master your combos, control the air, and outplay your opponents through pure mechanical skill.
body:
# Legendary Enchants
### *Vanilla PvP, rebuilt from the ground up.*

> Broken mechanics removed, skill-based enchants added. Master your combos, control the air, and outplay your opponents through pure mechanical skill.

---

## ✦ Custom Enchantments

| Enchant | Slot | Max Level | Effect |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Bloodlust** | Any weapon | IV | +1% damage per 2 hearts missing, up to +4% at level 4 |
| **Air Step** | Boots | II | Grants an extra mid-air jump per level, up to 2 jumps |
| **Shatter** | Sword | I | 15% chance to negate a piece of the opponent's armour |
| **Momentum** | Sword | I | 3-hit combo reduces attack cooldown by 25% — miss and it resets |
| **Gale Guard** | Chestplate | II | 5-hit combo without being hit triggers a wind burst knockback (1 min cooldown) |
| **Ricochet** | Bow | III | Arrows bounce off walls, up to 3 bounces at max level |

> *All enchants are accessed exclusively through the Upgrader, not the enchantment table or books.*

---

## ✦ Removed & Changed

- **Totems** removed
- **Netherite Upgraders** removed
- **Crystal & bed explosions** removed
- **Ender Pearls** no longer teleport on throw
- **Mace** cooldown increased to 30s, no enchants allowed
- **Notch Apples** capped at 5 per inventory
- **Protection, Unbreaking, Sharpness, Lunge, Fire Aspect, Thorns, Power** removed from E-Table & books
- **Density & Breach** fully removed
